title: Xtra Creamy French Beef Boeuf Bourguignon
description: A rich and creamy French dish featuring tender beef, smoked paprika, and a paleo-friendly twist on the classic boeuf bourguignon, this recipe is a quick-fix solution for a delicious dinner.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and add the beef cubes to brown on all sides.
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set aside, then add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the mushrooms to the pot and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the browned beef back to the pot and pour in enough beef broth to cover the ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Stir in the coconut cream and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed, then serve hot garnished with a sprig of fresh thyme.
